So, here's what we covered in this module. First, we covered the five critical marketing metrics in every business. Then we talked about why you need to know these five marketing metrics. And finally, we talked about how to make decisions based on your metrics in six different simple scenarios. Here's what to do now. First, schedule a time in your calendar each week and each month to run the necessary metrics reports. Then schedule a time in your calendar each week to review your metrics. And finally, schedule a time in your calendar each month to review your lifetime customer value.
